X.description: Lifetime (in hours) of the first light bulb, exponentially distributed with λ=0.001 per hour.

Y.description: Lifetime (in hours) of the second light bulb, exponentially distributed with λ=0.001 per hour, independent of X.

t.description: The time threshold (1000 hours) used to evaluate the probability that each bulb lasts at most this many hours.
